scenario.name: B2BUA UAC CANCEL
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK-cancel-[call_number] From: [caller] <sip:[caller]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[caller]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: SIPp B2BUA CANCEL test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp-a 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPp A CANCEL c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

CANCEL sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK-cancel-[call_number] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 CANCEL Contact: <sip:[caller]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK-cancel-[call_number] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[caller]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
